generated_oml:
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart motor (stepper) that moves the gantry horizontally"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist motor (stepper) controlling vertical movement of the crane"
]

instance HoistElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist electromagnet actuated by controller to pick and drop containers"
]

instance SwingAngleEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encodes swing angle of the gantry crane arm"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed affecting crane operation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance ArduinoInterfaceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Interface sensor combining Arduino and motor controllers to provide aggregated status"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoSensorData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoderSensor
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle data streamed via MQTT"
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometerSensor
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed data streamed via MQTT"
]

instance ArduinoSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoInterfaceSensor
    base:desc "Aggregated motor controller status data streamed via MQTT"
]

instance SensorDataLog : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series log of sensor data stored in TimescaleDB for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, ArduinoSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane produced in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaArcadiaModelingEnabler
]

instance KinematicTrajectoryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used to calculate optimal trajectories for container movement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLibEnabler
]

instance CraneSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics and controller responses"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaArcadiaModelingEnabler
]

instance PythonGantryLibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module enabling trajectory calculation and motor control"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance DockerComposeOrchestrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker Compose orchestrating microservices for the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, GrafanaVisualizationService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, OperatorInterfaceService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB instance used for time-series storage of sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for visualizing real-time and historical data"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaVisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for publishing sensor data and receiving control commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables OperatorInterfaceService
]

instance CapellaArcadiaModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella Arcadia modeling environment for systems engineering studies"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService
]

instance MkDocsDocumentationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MkDocs tool for generating digital twin documentation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DocumentationGenerationService
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that logs sensor data into TimescaleDB"
]

instance GrafanaVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that publishes data to Grafana dashboard"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating optimal crane trajectories using gantrylib"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating crane and controller behavior for validation"
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously validating live measurements against simulated models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAlertInsight, FaultClassificationInsight
]

instance OperatorInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing operator interface with alerting and control actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides CorrectiveAction
]

instance DocumentationGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating documentation using MkDocs"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on optimal trajectory paths derived from trajectory calculations"
]

instance ContinuousValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert when continuous validation detects deviations exceeding thresholds"
]

instance FaultClassificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnostic insight classifying faults based on sensor deviations"
]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to correct deviations either manually or automatically, triggered by validation alerts"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, HoistElectromagnet, SwingAngleEncoderSensor, WindSpeedAnemometerSensor, ArduinoInterfaceSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Trajectory Generator Service produces optimal trajectories; the Control Application sends motion commands to the Physical Crane Interface which drives cart and hoist motors via their controllers, with feedback triggering updates or alerts."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation; logging and validation run continuously at each control cycle; trajectory generation invoked per task request."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Context diagram shows Operator and Researcher actors; container diagram shows five physical containers (CR, Interface, Control App, Logging App, HM Interface) and six digital twin containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, MQTT Broker) interconnected via MQTT and database links."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design stage (CAD and kinematic models), manufacturing stage (physical crane built per BOM), and operational stage (continuous operation, logging, validation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares live measurements with simulation, computing distance metrics and threshold checks to detect deviations; simulation model provides reference behavior."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT broker (Eclipse Mosquitto) mediates inter‑service communication; Logging Application writes to TimescaleDB via PostgreSQL SQL; Physical interface connects to motor controllers likely via serial/USB."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All twin services containerized with Docker and launched via docker‑compose on a personal computer; application modules distributed as pip package; code hosted on GitHub with MkDocs documentation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of open‑source standards such as MQTT protocol, PostgreSQL‑compatible TimescaleDB, and Grafana dashboards; no industry‑specific twin frameworks."
]
